shortFormVideo.hook: If your Melbourne FL website gets traffic but not leads, audit these five leaks before buying more ads.
shortFormVideo.script: Open with the problem: visitors are landing but not acting. Show five quick checks: headline clarity, proof near the first CTA, short forms, internal links from pages with traffic, and follow-up speed. Close by pointing viewers to the full EB28 website audit checklist.
shortFormVideo.creativeBrief: Vertical 30-45 second talking-head or screen-record. Show the article headline, then overlay the five audit points as text beats. End card: eb28.co/blog/ and richducat@gmail.com for direct contact.
